diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..254bc05 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -112,7 +112,8 @@ class timeout:
         self._task = None
         return None
 
-    def _cancel_task(self) -> None:
-        if self._task is not None:
-            self._task.cancel()
+    def _cancel_task (self) -> None :
+        if not self._cancelled:
             self._cancelled = True
+            if self._task is not None and not self._task.done():
+                self._task.cancel()
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py

--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -128,9 +128,8 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         self.response_start = {
             "type": "http.response.start",
             "status": status_code,
-            "headers": headers,
+            "headers": [(name, value.encode('ascii')) for name, value in headers],
         }
-
     @sync_to_async
     def run_wsgi_app(self, body):
         """
